mapper.select:
SELECT CD_GROUP_ID1 AS expnsn_str_val1 , CD_GROUP_ID2 AS expnsn_str_val2 , DOC_VER , DOC_CONTENT FROM
SELECT CD_GROUP_ID1 , CD_GROUP_ID2 , DOC_VER , DOC_CONTENT FROM NMCP_FORM_DTL@DL_MCP WHERE CD_GROUP_ID1 = #{item.expnsnStrVal1} AND CD_GROUP_ID2 = #{item.expnsnStrVal2} AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND doc_ver = ( SELECT max(doc_ver) FROM NMCP_FORM_DTL@DL_MCP WHERE CD_GROUP_ID1 = #{item.expnsnStrVal1} AND CD_GROUP_ID2 = #{item.expnsnStrVal2} AND USE_YN = 'Y' )
